titleStmt.title: SII 27.354: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 354. (A.R. No. 321 of 1931-32.) KUDI, (No. 34) UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1335, Nandana, [Phālguṇa] śu. 12, Sunday, corresponding to 1413 A.D., February 12. The Śaka year was current.
It registers a gift of land for offerings to god Śaṅkaranārāyaṇadēva, made after purchase, by Bemmaṇañcha Toḷaha who was enjoying the kumāravṛitti under his elder brother whose name is not clear.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī . svastiśrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . nirvvighnamastu
namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trayilōkya
nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayā
dbhyudayada śakavaruṣa 1335 neyanaṁdana saṁvatsarada ghā
lguṇa śu 12 Alu śrīmatu sakaḷa guṇa saṁpaṁnarappa
ṁca toḷahara kāladali Avarataṁma beṁmaṇaṁ ca
ru kumāra Urattiya naḍavakāladali śrī nārāya
ṇa dēvarige Amrutapaḍige koṭṭa na kayiṁdalu ho
leyana baḷiya dugaiyana li koṁḍa mūlada bāḷina
catusīmeya vivaramāḍalu nena gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍu
valu teṁkalu Aṁṇapaḍilana gaḍiyiṁda baḍagalu
ḍagalu haranagaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu paḍuvalu Ū
ra paḍilana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yiṁtī nālu
ku catusīme yiṁdoḷagaṇa bayalagade Oṁdu mere
ya gade Oṁdu gade 2 kaṁ bituva bedegaṇagilu nā
gaṁḍugalu veraḍu mūḍe yipatu hāne bituva
bāḷu Alli hakalu hāru halasu māu teṁgu nidhi si
dhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa sahita �yo bāḷanu duguṇa
yiki śrī śaṁkaranārāyaṇa dēvarige Amrutapaḍige A
caṁdrārkkavāgi dhārāpūrvvakavāgi yeṟedu koṭa
bāḷu yī bāḷikeya mēle prativaruṣa 1 kū naḍava gē
ṇi yakki nāgaṁ mu 6 hā 20 Akṣāradalu Aṟumu
ḍe yippattu hāne yī bāḷikeya basageya tettu
kruṣṇahātranu taṁma saṁtāna saṁtāna kāla tapade yī bā
ḷikeya bitigēṇi yakkiya naḍasi bahanu Oṁdu kā
lada gēṇiyakki putrana kayyali sikidare Akkiya
keyada besi hōhaneṁdu barasida śilāsāsānakke toḷaha
ra beṁmaṇaṁcara Oppa sēnabōva
Oppa śrīmahādēvaru śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.354 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
